issues.description: Missing condition to check if attacking Character has ＜Slash＞ attribute. The effect should only trigger when opponent's Character with Slash attribute attacks.
Trigger should be 'OnAttack' (opponent's Character attacks) not 'OnAttacked'. OnAttacked typically refers to this card being attacked.
Duration 'EndOfBattle' is correct, but DSL should clarify this is during opponent's turn battle resolution.
